title: Rectorate Common Courses 2025-2026 Fall Term Resit Dates/Times
content:
Rectorate Common Courses 2025-2026 Fall Term Resit Dates/Times

Rectorate Common Courses Resit exams will be held on Tuesday,

February 10, 2026

at the times given in the table below. Supplemental exams will be held in the Central Campus B-C-D blocks classrooms. You can see the halls where you will take the exam in the STIX course announcements.

(Students with DD-DC letter grades who want to take the supplemental exam will be present at the Central Campus C block -1st floor Aziz Sancar Conference Hall at the exam time of the relevant course.)

February 10, 2026 Tuesday

17:30-18:00

18:10-18:40

18:50 - 19:20

ATA103-Principles of Atatürk

and History of Turkish Revolution I

TURK103- Turkish Language I

ING103- Undergraduate English I
